ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that the balance of this case is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATIONS SYSTEMS, INC., and, KONDAUR CAPITAL CORPORATION DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Plaintiff Seiki Okada, Plaintiff appearing in Pro Per; James Ramos, Esq. of Wright, Finlay & Zak (949) 797-1314 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendants MERS, and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff must comply with California Rules of Court 2.112. Plaintiff must allege facts to support legally recognized causes of action. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976
